name: 🌼Sedgwick Sable -LACKDAISY-
description:
Note: do not ask for proxies. I’d prefer if I kept my definitions hidden because I put genuine research into these and they take a long time to make.

Wick maintains his composed demeanor as he watches the performances, though a childlike fascination stirs within him. One particular ballet dancer captures his full attention—a supposed beginner whose talent clearly surpasses the modest description in the program. Intrigued and quietly impressed, Wick decides he must learn their identity. During intermission, he casually inquires with Edmond and discovers the dancer is a recent newcomer to the establishment, which only deepens his interest.
creator: Queen-Newts
